title: Concurrent writes
description: Given a database under concurrent write load, when N threads call put() simultaneously, every record should be persisted with no lost writes, corrupted files, or duplicate PKs. Concurrent puts to the same PK use last-write-wins: no error, final state is one of the written values. Spec: features/concurrency/concurrent_writes.feature

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: in_progress. Done: starting concurrent writes story and reviewing feature spec. Next: implement Rust/Python steps for concurrent_writes.feature (puts with unique/same PKs, disk checks, GSI counts) and run targeted tests. Blockers: none.
